Like what would the hard Mulligan's be for?
I would say keep miryam execute, wheels, doll's 0 & 1 cost, goliath AOE, ogier 2 & 3 cost, and 1 strike if 2 of a character's strikes are together.

stuff like posse, goliath single target skills, bubble are nice late game and early game, but the stuff i say to keep is bc it is not so good later on.
Stuff like doll 3 cost, ogier cleanse are terrible cards that you're better off never seeing.
and miryam dispel, I think it's too expensive early on, better use it later. I could be very wrong though.

mulligans go to very bottom of deck, so it's why i would keep 1 strike of a character with both strikes in opener. you want to benefit from ogier charge without having to draw to the very bottom of deck
